label: Style item
description: Abstract base for hair, beard, tattoo, and fur style defs. Provides the texture path, gender filter, category grouping, and prerequisite fields shared by all style item types.

styleTags.label: Style tags
styleTags.description: String identifiers used by pawns and genes to filter which styles are eligible. Tags are plain strings, not def references. Also loadable from XML as <hairTags>.

styleGender.label: Style gender
styleGender.description: Gender restriction controlling which pawns can use this style. Any allows all pawns; the MaleUsually and FemaleUsually values bias generation without hard-locking. Also loadable from XML as <hairGender>.

category.label: Category
category.description: StyleItemCategoryDef that groups this style in the pawn editor UI. Defaults to Misc when absent at runtime.

noGraphic.label: No graphic
noGraphic.description: If true, this style has no texture. The pawn renders without any visual for this slot. Suppresses the texPath config error.

overrideShaderTypeDef.label: Override shader type
overrideShaderTypeDef.description: ShaderTypeDef used when rendering this style's graphic. When absent, styles use their default shader (e.g., CutoutHair for hair).

requiredGene.label: Required gene
requiredGene.description: GeneDef that a pawn must have for this style to be available. Used to restrict styles to xenotype-specific appearances.

requiredMutant.label: Required mutant
requiredMutant.description: MutantDef that a pawn must be for this style to be available. Used by Anomaly ghoul hair styles.

texPath.label: Texture path
texPath.description: Content-relative path to the style texture, without directional suffix (e.g., _south). Required by game config validation unless noGraphic is true. The icon falls back to texPath + "_south" when iconPath is absent.

iconPath.label: Icon path
iconPath.description: Explicit icon texture path. When absent, the icon is derived from texPath + "_south" at runtime.
